rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Bank Of America N.A.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 128.7 And 1008(D); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Hearing Required. The Court will consider (1) whether the hearing should be continued in light of the pending motion to be relieved as counsel, (2) if not continued, whether the motion for sanctions should be granted, and (3) if granted, what amount of sanctions should be imposed.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BERNARD AND ALICE GICOVATE FAMILY TRUST U/A/D APRIL 27, 1995
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct And Amend Order Approving 2nd Account & Report Of Successor Trustee And Allowing Ordinary Trustee'S And Atty'S Fees; And Declaration By Att In Support
rulings.Rulings: Denied. The motion is in effect a motion to reconsider without submitting any new facts or law within the meaning of CCP section 1008. The Court's ruling is consistent with the explanation given in open court that having awarded fees based on 1% (which was contested as too high by the objector), no further fees would be awarded for for time the Court viewed as trustee work. The Court's order reflected its independent analysis of time sheets on that basis. The successor trustee is not entitled to a statement of decision on this motion for reconsideration. Any party wishing to contest this ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, September 19, 2012.
